steps.title: Recognize the timing connection
steps.content: Genetic markers from Mesa Verde turkeys appear in Rio Grande Valley turkeys only after 1280 — the year Ancestral Puebloans dispersed from Mesa Verde.

steps.title: Identify the required explanation
steps.content: Ancestral Puebloans migrating to Rio Grande Valley around 1280 and carrying their domesticated turkeys is the only way Rio Grande Valley turkeys could inherit Mesa Verde genetic markers after that date. The other choices either describe factors the passage doesn't discuss, contradict the genetic evidence, or reverse the direction of influence. That matches choice B — B is correct.
